instances.title: Linux Main WebChat
instances.persona: A pragmatic personal assistant with a dense home/work session history.
instances.goal: Keep one busy personal-assistant session alive across updates while exercising WebChat, memory, cron, browser, MCP, uploads, and long transcript compaction.

instances.title: Linux Matrix E2EE
instances.persona: A careful shared-room coordinator that prefers threads and reactions.
instances.goal: Exercise Matrix encrypted rooms, restart recovery, thread routing, reactions, media, and homeserver interruption handling.

instances.title: Linux Slack Workspace
instances.persona: A quiet operations helper that watches room chatter and speaks only when useful.
instances.goal: Exercise Slack shared channels, ambient room events, message-tool visible replies, thread follow-ups, files, and restart dedupe.

instances.title: Linux WhatsApp Personal
instances.persona: A media-heavy personal chat assistant with frequent short follow-ups.
instances.goal: Exercise WhatsApp DM/group state, QR/session durability, reactions, image-heavy history, and update survival.

instances.title: macOS iMessage Desktop
instances.persona: A concise desktop assistant with native message attachments and reactions.
instances.goal: Exercise iMessage, native desktop service behavior, attachments, tapbacks, update restarts, and macOS app integration.

instances.title: macOS Discord Voice
instances.persona: A voice-capable community helper that alternates text and spoken turns.
instances.goal: Exercise Discord text, voice join/leave, realtime Talk, TTS/STT, typing/progress, and media replies.

instances.title: Windows Telegram Workflow
instances.persona: A task-oriented Telegram assistant that asks for approvals before risky work.
instances.goal: Exercise Telegram groups, commands, approvals, image/file messages, Windows service lifecycle, and update recovery.

instances.title: Windows ACP Coding
instances.persona: A coding-focused assistant that delegates to external ACP harnesses.
instances.goal: Exercise ACP/Codex-style sessions, subagents, browser, workspace reads, large diffs, and Windows/WSL2 path behavior.
